rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees involving ports, implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE type declarations match AADL scalar types (int, real, bool) and avoid invalid references
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs in component type scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and => for implication
Constants and equations in AGREE must use valid AADL scalar types (int, real, bool)
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Avoid range comparisons or 0/1 equality over Boolean data ports unless the AADL type is explicitly boolean
irrelevant_topics: model repair patterns and validator-driven fixes
